text.title: OpenAI Function Calling — Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure for one tool-use round-trip or one structured-extraction call.

step.name: define-tools-or-model
step.input: Pipeline contract — what external action or schema is needed.
step.action: Author tool JSON Schemas (for tool use) OR a Pydantic model (for extraction). Register tool callables in `tool_registry`.
step.output: tools list or response_format class, registry populated.

step.name: call-with-gates
step.input: messages, model id, tools or response_format.
step.action: Call `client.chat.completions.create` (tools) or `client.beta.chat.completions.parse` (extraction). Set `tool_choice` per dependency. Pin `parallel_tool_calls` based on coherence policy.
step.decision-gate: If model is pre-gpt-4o, skip `parse` — use `json_object` mode + manual validation.

step.name: branch-by-shape
step.action: Branch: refusal → raise; tool_calls populated → step 4; parsed populated → step 6 (no tool loop needed); content only → step 6.

step.name: execute-tool-calls
step.action: Run `coherence_check(tool_calls)` if any tool writes external state. For each call, dispatch via `tool_registry[name](**json.loads(arguments))`. Capture result.
step.decision-gate: If coherence check fails, return to model for clarification instead of executing.

step.name: append-and-recall
step.action: Append assistant message (with tool_calls) THEN every tool result keyed by tool_call_id, IN ORDER. Call the model again.
step.output: Final assistant content or further tool_calls (loop step 3).

step.name: log-and-return
step.action: Persist a record matching the output contract (kind, refusal, parsed/tool_calls/content, latency_ms, request_id).
step.output: Validated record written; result returned to caller.
